summary: Comprehensive backend (pytest) + frontend (Playwright) test of Gylfa MVP. Backend: 19/19 pytest cases PASSED including auth (register/login/logout/me/forgot+reset roundtrip), goals CRUD, checkin XP+streak+duplicate-400, circles create/join/detail with stats+leaderboard sort, achievements (8 items), notifications mark-read flows, and admin-only digest. [EMAIL-MOCK] log lines confirmed in /var/log/supervisor/backend.err.log. Demo password restored to demo123. Frontend: Landing (all 6 testids present, hero text + 4 stats render), Login (demo-creds button populates fields, redirects to /dashboard), Dashboard (Lv.8 Adept, Aria, 3 stat tiles, 4 quest toggles, bell badge=2, sidebar nav), Goals (daily/weekly tabs, create-modal opens & ESC-closes), Circles (Shadow Guild + SHADOW01 code visible, detail page shows members), Profile (recharts svg + 8 achievement tiles), Forgot-password (success toast + success card), Logout (returns to /login). Protected /dashboard correctly redirects to /login when token absent.
spec_deviations_minor: Spec says 'Logout returns to /'. Actual logout redirects to /login (functionally correct, just a different landing page).
Landing stat 'CIRCLES PACK COUNT' shows '2' for demo (one Shadow Guild + the TEST_ circle from prior test runs) — acceptable test artifact; idempotent seeding keeps Shadow Guild stable.
action_items: Optional: align frontend data-testid names to those documented in the PRD/spec (demo-btn, notifications-bell, goals-new-btn, user-card-logout). Functional impact: none — UI works perfectly.
Optional: clean up TEST_ goals/circles created during testing if pristine seed state is desired (not strictly necessary; idempotent seed leaves Shadow Guild intact).
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 991 lines — single-file design. Consider splitting into routers (auth.py, goals.py, circles.py, etc.) for maintainability if the app grows.
set_auth_cookie uses samesite='none' + secure=True which is correct for cross-site iframe/preview but mandates HTTPS. Confirmed working through the preview proxy.
MongoDB _id is consistently mapped to 'id' on response — no ObjectId/JSON serialization issues observed.
Forgot-password always returns ok (good — prevents user enumeration).
JWT verifies both httpOnly cookie and Bearer header — robust.
[EMAIL-MOCK] fallback works as designed when RESEND_API_KEY is empty.
test_credentials: demo@gylfa.app/demo123 and admin@gylfa.app/admin123 — both confirmed working post-test-run.
seed_data_creation: Tests created (and cleaned up) TEST_ goals and one TEST_Circle_xxxx (left in DB; harmless, owned by demo). Demo password reset round-trip verified and restored to demo123.
mocked_apis_verified: Resend email sending is mocked via [EMAIL-MOCK] logger lines (confirmed in backend logs for forgot-password reset link and weekly digest run).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend at https://shadow-guild-3.preview.emergentagent.com/api is healthy with seed data: demo user (Aria) Lv.8/2840 XP, Shadow Guild circle (SHADOW01), 5 demo goals. Run pytest /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py as regression. Frontend testids follow pattern <page>-<element>-btn (login-demo-btn, goals-create-btn, logout-btn, notifications-bell-btn). NOT the PRD-listed shorter names.
